subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One calleth out from the precincts of the prison that there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and maketh mention of those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المظلوم ینادی من شطر السجن انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم و یذکر الذینهم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @call to action, @knowledge; recognition of God
